extra.reason: GitHub repo https://github.com/icherniukh/mr-prompter-bot created and code pushed from PR extraction. beads, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md set up.
Model shortlist, .env.example, and README updated with the 6 new candidate models + explicit note that they are under evaluation and many may not work for image editing. Config tests still pass.

Added two strong engine-level tests in test_engine.py: one exercising the real watermark removal instruction + single-image payload on one image, plus an explicit guard that remove_overlays never emits multiple images (anti-collage at the lowest layer). All tests pass.

Added two handler-level tests in test_handlers.py proving that N separate image messages (as Telegram delivers them) always produce N independent calls to remove_overlays with distinct single images. Includes concurrent case. No path creates a collage payload. Full suite now at 28 green tests.

All work complete: misleading model candidates updated in code+docs with evaluation warning. 4 new tests added (2 engine + 2 handlers) proving single-image removal + strict batch independence (no collages). Full test suite: 28/28 passing. Changes committed and will be pushed.
